Trade in services as a percentage of GDP, covering resident and non-resident service transactions.
Percentage of children under age 5 whose births are registered, total, based on survey data.
Percentage of female children under age 5 whose births are registered, based on survey data.
Percentage of male children under age 5 whose births are registered, based on survey data.
Agricultural tractors exports value in current US dollars from FAO data.
Agricultural tractors exports quantity from FAO data.
Cereal exports value in current US dollars from FAO, covering wheat, rice, maize and other grains.
Cereal exports quantity in tonnes from FAO, covering wheat, rice, maize and other grains.
Hazardous pesticides imports value in current US dollars from FAO.
Pesticides imports value in current US dollars from FAO.
Total agricultural imports value in current US dollars from FAO.
Communications, computer, information and other services as percentage of service imports (BoP).
Primary income payments (BoP, current US$): employee compensation and investment income paid to nonresidents.
Imports of goods and services (BoP, current US$): change in economic ownership of goods and services from nonresidents.
Insurance and financial services as percentage of service imports (BoP).
Goods imports (BoP, current US$): change in economic ownership of goods from nonresidents to residents.
Service imports (BoP, current US$): services provided by nonresidents to residents.
Charges for use of intellectual property, payments (BoP, current US$): patent, trademark, copyright fees.
Imports of total services (Debit, current US$): calculated as total imports minus merchandise imports.
Imports of goods, services and primary income (BoP, current US$).
Transport services imports value (BoP, current US$): sea, air, land, pipeline transport services.
Transport services as percentage of service imports (BoP).
Travel services imports value (BoP, current US$): goods and services acquired by travelers abroad.
Travel services as percentage of service imports (BoP).
Foreign direct investment net outflows by reporting economy (IMF-BoP, current US$).
Foreign direct investment net outflows (BoP, current US$): equity capital and reinvested earnings.
Foreign direct investment net outflows as percentage of GDP.
Foreign direct investment net outflows as percentage of GDP (alternate BoP definition).
Current transfers payments (BoP, current US$): transfers of income between residents and rest of world.
Migrant remittance outflows in current US dollars: sum of workers' remittances sent abroad.
Official current transfers payments (BoP, current US$): government-to-government current transfers paid.
Secondary income, other sectors, payments (BoP, current US$): private sector current transfers abroad.
Workers' remittances payments (BoP, current US$): transfers by migrant workers abroad.
Personal remittances paid (current US$): personal transfers and compensation of employees paid abroad.
Current account balance (BoP, current US$): balance of trade, income, and transfers with rest of world.
Current account balance as percentage of GDP.
Current account balance as percentage of GNP.
Current account balance excluding net official capital grants as percentage of GDP.
Debt service not paid: arrears accumulation (BoP, current US$) on interest and amortization.
Net financial account (BoP, current US$): net acquisition and disposal of financial assets and liabilities.
Net primary income (BoP, current US$): net labor and property/entrepreneurial income from abroad.
Net income as percentage of GDP: receipts and payments of compensation and investment income.
Net trade in goods and services (BoP, current US$): exports minus imports of goods and services.
Net trade in goods (BoP, current US$): exports minus imports of goods.
Net errors and omissions (BoP, current US$): residual balancing item in balance of payments.
Capital flows not elsewhere included (BoP, current US$): residual capital transactions.
Other capital flows, net (BoP, current US$): short-term capital, errors/omissions, and other transactions.
Foreign direct investment, net (BoP, current US$): cross-border control investment.
Foreign direct investment as percentage of GDP: net inflows to acquire lasting management interest.
Net long-term borrowing (BoP, current US$): external debt disbursements less repayments plus other flows.
